title: Design: homepage font selection — Outfit or Sora for headings, system fonts for body
description: Pick a custom font for headings that has personality — Outfit or Sora are top candidates. Body text stays on system fonts for speed. Deliverable: font pairing recommendation with weight/size specs for h1-h4, body, captions.

comment.body:
Font pairing spec complete. Recommendation: **Outfit** (Google Fonts) for all headings + buttons; system fonts for body. Spec includes full type scale (h1–h4, body, caption, button) with px sizes, weights, and line-heights for desktop and mobile, plus ready-to-paste CSS vars and `<head>` snippet.

Plan: [TESA-160#document-plan](/TESA/issues/TESA-160#document-plan)
